2017-files-paragraph: Do you have a backup of the FacturaScripts 2017 files? Copy the zip to the MyFiles / FS2017Migrator folder in FacturaScripts.
2017-foreign-keys-enabled: Foreign keys are enabled. Before migrating you must disable them by adding define('FS_DB_FOREIGN_KEYS', false); to your config.php file and reloading this page. Re-enable them when the migration is finished.
2017-foreign-keys-restore: Migration finished. Re-enable foreign keys by removing the FS_DB_FOREIGN_KEYS line from your config.php file (or setting it to true).
2017-migrator-paragraph: This wizard allows you to migrate data from the 2017 version to the new 2026 structure.
2017-mysql-charset-problem: MySQL encoding must be utf8. Check this page %web%
are-you-sure-migration: Remember that the changes cannot be undone, and that you will not be able to use FacturaScripts 2017 with this same database. Do you want to continue?
